title: Search infra issue ERR_SEA_7265
description: Intermittent search timeouts and failures observed by users hitting /api/search
severity: cache miss pattern and thread contention during peak queries.
resolution_steps: Flush local search cache and validated TTLs
Applied circuit-breaker to upstream index requests
Added request-level timeouts and alert rule for queue length
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-21T16:00:34.189Z ERROR SearchService [reqId=78fabc12] NullPointerException at SearchHandler.handle(SearchHandler.java:112)
2025-09-21T16:00:34.190Z WARN SearchService ThreadPool-5 queue-size=153; active=48; max=50
2025-09-21T16:00:35.005Z INFO RetryPolicy Retrying request (policy=exp-backoff, attempt=2)

title: Inventory infra issue ERR_INV_7949
description: Inventory API returning intermittent timeouts and authentication retries to DB observed
severity: auth handshake sometimes fails causing connection churn.
resolution_steps: Increase DB pool max connections from 50 -> 100
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-08-16T02:22:34.189Z ERROR InventoryService [req=aa23] DBConnectionTimeout: could not get connection in 30s
2025-08-16T02:22:34.190Z WARN AuthClient token fetch failed (status=502)
2025-08-16T02:22:35.004Z INFO PoolManager resizing pool to 80

title: Inventory bug issue ERR_INV_1189
description: Repeated cache invalidation bugs causing stale reads and occasional duplicate order allocations.
root_cause: Race condition in cache invalidation callback producing stale inventory reads.
resolution_steps: Apply fix to cache invalidation handler to use compare-and-swap
Invalidate caches cluster-wide with version token
Add unit tests for concurrent invalidation
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-10-17T06:11:34.189Z ERROR InventoryCache [req=cb7] CacheInvalidationRaceException at CacheManager.invalidate(CacheManager.java:88)
2025-10-17T06:11:34.240Z INFO InventoryService Returning cached value older-than 5m
2025-10-17T06:12:01.005Z INFO Reconciler started jobId=inv-reconcile-20251017

title: Inventory performance issue ERR_INV_9792
description: Inventory queries experiencing elevated p95 latency during batch reindex jobs and during deployments.
root_cause: Background reindex combined with insufficient DB read replicas; query plans show full table scans.
resolution_steps: Throttle reindex jobs to off-peak hours
Add read replicas and update connection routing
Optimize slow SQL and add indexes
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-24T00:31:34.189Z WARN InventoryReindex Job[20251124] high CPU 88%
2025-11-24T00:31:35.003Z ERROR SQLExecutor slow query detected duration=4500ms; query="select * from inventory where updated_at > ?"
2025-11-24T00:31:36.006Z INFO Autoscaler scaled replicas +2

title: Payments data issue ERR_PAY_9226
description: Payment processing failures where payloads lost on queue handoff causing partial payments and reconciliation mismatches.
root_cause: Message queue ack mis-handled during high I/O causing dropped events.
resolution_steps: Restarted queue broker and processed dead-letter queue
Enable at-least-once delivery for payments topic
Add idempotency keys to payment processor
Run reconciliation script to reconcile missing payments
Add monitoring for queue lag and DLQ size
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-24T18:39:34.189Z ERROR PaymentWorker [msgId=pay-993] Failed to ack message due to BrokerIOException
2025-09-24T18:39:34.400Z WARN MQClient re-queued message attempt=1
2025-09-24T18:40:01.110Z INFO Reconciler matched 12 missing transactions

title: Search performance issue ERR_SEA_6056
description: Search p99 latency and increased error rates during peak traffic window
root_cause: Hot shards and uneven query routing causing node overload.
resolution_steps: Evacuate hot shards to balanced nodes
Apply routing rule to distribute queries
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-27T05:24:34.189Z WARN NodeLoadBalancer node=search-2 load=94% shard-hot=true
2025-11-27T05:24:35.003Z ERROR QueryProcessor p99 latency 3800ms
2025-11-27T05:25:01.101Z INFO Rebalance scheduled

title: Payments infra issue ERR_PAY_8721
description: Payments downstream DB showing connection timeouts under high load, intermittent 502s returned to clients.
root_cause: DB connection pool exhausted due to long-running reconciliation queries.
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-21T04:17:34.189Z ERROR DBPool maxWaitExceeded: waited 30000ms
2025-09-21T04:17:35.003Z WARN Reconciler job running longer-than-expected duration=3600s
2025-09-21T04:20:00.100Z INFO Scaled payments-db read replicas +2

title: Notifications performance issue ERR_NOT_7668
description: Notifications queue lag spiked causing delayed emails and mobile push delivery.
root_cause: Consumer lag due to single-threaded worker and a sudden increase in backfill traffic.
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-15T02:47:34.189Z WARN ConsumerGroup lag=12000 messages topic=notifications.high-priority
2025-11-15T02:47:35.004Z INFO Worker restarted (pid=442) due to OOM kill
2025-11-15T02:50:01.110Z INFO DLQ drained 4k messages

title: Payments bug issue ERR_PAY_4627
description: Intermittent double-charging detected for specific 3rd-party gateway path during retries.
root_cause: Lack of idempotency handling when retrying on gateway timeouts.
resolution_steps: Add idempotency-key handling to payment endpoint
Add integration test for retry semantics
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-14T11:57:34.189Z ERROR PaymentProcessor received duplicate callback txnId=txn-1122
2025-09-14T11:57:35.004Z INFO Reconciler detected duplicate=2
2025-09-14T11:58:01.100Z INFO Refund issued for duplicate txnId=txn-1122

title: Search bug issue ERR_SEA_6864
description: Search returning 500 for specific query patterns; error originated from JSON parsing layer after special characters.
root_cause: Unescaped characters in user queries hit serializer causing runtime exception.
resolution_steps: Patch serializer to handle unicode escapes
Deploy hotfix and monitor ERR rates
Update docs for supported query characters
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-27T13:37:34.189Z ERROR JsonSerializer UnexpectedCharacterException at Serializer.java:47 input='\uD83D'
2025-09-27T13:37:34.400Z WARN EdgeProxy returned 400 for malformed request
2025-09-27T13:40:12.101Z INFO Hotfix deployed search-service v1.9.2

title: Auth bug issue ERR_AUT_2495
description: Users intermittently cannot login; stack shows race in session creation under high concurrency.
root_cause: Race condition in session-store leading to occasional session overwrite and authentication failure.
resolution_steps: Patch session-store to use optimistic locking
Deploy change across all auth nodes
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-07-09T19:46:34.189Z ERROR SessionStore [req=usr-321] ConcurrentModificationException at SessionStore.java:221
2025-07-09T19:46:35.004Z WARN AuthService loginFailCount++ user=usr-321
2025-07-09T19:50:01.110Z INFO Migration script applied

title: Catalog config issue ERR_CAT_1698
description: Catalog returning stale configuration causing incompatible feature flags between regions.
root_cause: Config propagation delay due to broken config-sync job.
resolution_steps: Manually propagate latest config to region B
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-10-15T20:57:34.189Z WARN ConfigSync last_applied_version=2025-10-14 region=B lag=95m
2025-10-15T20:58:01.005Z INFO Manual propagate successful
2025-10-15T21:05:05.101Z INFO ConfigSync job restarted

title: Inventory bug issue ERR_INV_2707
description: Inventory API occasionally returns negative stock for SKUs after concurrent adjustments.
root_cause: Missing transactional boundary around inventory decrement operations causing negative stock.
resolution_steps: Add DB transaction for inventory adjustments
Add DB constraint to prevent negative stock
Add unit tests for concurrent updates
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-10-31T21:10:34.189Z ERROR InventoryService Failed to apply delta sku=SKU-221 reason=partial-commit
2025-10-31T21:10:35.004Z INFO Reconciler detected negative entries count=5
2025-10-31T21:30:01.110Z INFO Backfill correction applied

title: Orders bug issue ERR_ORD_3931
description: Orders API intermittently created duplicate orders when retrying on payment timeout, leading to double shipments.
root_cause: Missing idempotency key handling in orders submit path during payment retry.
resolution_steps: Add compensating cancel for duplicate shipments
Add integration tests for retried payments
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-07-18T00:23:34.189Z ERROR OrdersService DuplicateOrderException orderRef=ord-777 attempt=2
2025-07-18T00:23:35.003Z INFO Reconciler detected duplicates=3
2025-07-18T00:25:01.101Z INFO Compensating cancellations issued

title: Auth performance issue ERR_AUT_7546
description: High auth p95 latency causing login slowness for certain regions correlated with token verification timeouts.
root_cause: Remote token verification service had intermittent timeouts resulting in blocking auth flow.
resolution_steps: Add local cache for token verification
Fallback to cached verification on timeout
Coordinate with verifier team for SLA improvements
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-02T05:47:34.189Z WARN TokenVerifier call timeout=5100ms endpoint=verifier.internal
2025-09-02T05:47:35.004Z INFO Using cached verification result for user=usr-211
2025-09-02T05:50:12.110Z INFO Token verifier team fixed transient DB restarts

title: Catalog config issue ERR_CAT_9155
description: Config mismatch caused image proxy URLs to be rewritten incorrectly in production.
root_cause: Broken environment templating replaced hostnames incorrectly in image URLs.
resolution_steps: Fix templating variables in config artifact
Add config lint step in CI
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-07-08T03:12:34.189Z ERROR TemplateEngine variable HOSTNAME unresolved-> replaced with 'null'
2025-07-08T03:15:05.004Z INFO Backfill job corrected 3500 image URLs
2025-07-08T03:30:01.101Z INFO CI lint added validation

title: Orders config issue ERR_ORD_3049
description: Orders service experienced partial outages due to misapplied feature-toggle causing incompatible API schema.
root_cause: Feature-toggle incorrectly rolled out without contract bump; older clients failed deserialization.
resolution_steps: Add versioned endpoints for transitional rollout
Notify clients of enforced schema change
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-13T01:53:34.189Z ERROR OrdersDeserializer UnexpectedFieldException at OrdersDeserializer.java:67
2025-09-13T01:54:05.004Z WARN Canary clients failing schema checks
2025-09-13T02:05:01.101Z INFO Rollback completed

title: Auth infra issue ERR_AUT_7295
description: Auth nodes failed to join cluster after OS-level kernel patch applied, causing reduced capacity.
root_cause: Kernel patch caused ephemeral network interface name changes; cluster membership failed.
resolution_steps: Revert kernel patch on affected nodes
Standardize network interface naming in init scripts
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-07-10T22:32:34.189Z ERROR ClusterManager NodeJoinFailed node=auth-3 reason=ifcfg mismatch
2025-07-10T22:33:01.005Z INFO Rolling restart auth cluster
2025-07-10T22:40:12.110Z INFO Node rejoined cluster

title: Orders data issue ERR_ORD_3557
description: Orders reconciliation failed producing mismatched totals between microservices and ledger.
root_cause: Ledger ingestion lag produced temporary mismatch during high-volume runs.
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-05T11:44:34.189Z WARN LedgerIngest lag=900s last_processed_id=9821
2025-11-05T11:45:01.004Z INFO Backfill job started
2025-11-05T12:20:01.110Z INFO Matched 98% of transactions

title: Payments performance issue ERR_PAY_6699
description: Payments p95 increased due to synchronous calls to external billing partner during settlement, blocking main request path.
root_cause: Synchronous partner call in hot path causing blocking; partner had intermittent slowness.
resolution_steps: Move partner call to async settlement queue
Add timeout + circuit-breaker for partner call
Add stubbed integration tests for partner behavior
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-16T09:37:34.189Z WARN ExternalBilling timeout=4500ms endpoint=billing.partner
2025-09-16T09:37:35.003Z ERROR PaymentController blocked waiting partner response
2025-09-16T09:40:01.101Z INFO Queued settlement async

title: Search bug issue ERR_SEA_2045
description: Search returned 503 for a subset of queries after partial node outage; logs show NPE in query routing.
root_cause: Query router didn't handle missing shard metadata after rolling upgrade causing NPE.
resolution_steps: Add guard for missing shard metadata
Rebuild routing metadata from cluster state
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-17T02:44:34.189Z ERROR QueryRouter NullPointerException at QueryRouter.java:210
2025-11-17T02:44:35.003Z WARN Rolling-restart detected inconsistent cluster-state
2025-11-17T02:50:12.101Z INFO Metadata rebuilt from primary node

title: Orders performance issue ERR_ORD_6600
description: Orders service experiencing slow writes to order-store in peak; write latency causing UI timeouts.
root_cause: Order-store hitting IO saturation due to large synchronous attachments being stored with orders.
resolution_steps: Offload attachments to object-store and store references
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-08-06T22:46:34.189Z WARN OrderStore fsync latency=230ms
2025-08-06T22:47:01.005Z ERROR AttachmentService attempted large upload size=120MB
2025-08-06T22:50:01.110Z INFO Moved attachments to object-store

title: Shipping data issue ERR_SHI_2060
description: Shipping microservice produced incorrect address normalizations after a change in the address-canonicalizer library.
root_cause: Library upgrade introduced regression in address parsing rules leading to misrouted shipments.
resolution_steps: Pin address-canonicalizer to previous stable release
Create compatibility tests for address formats
Add canary tests for shipping changes
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-10-12T08:22:34.189Z ERROR AddressCanonicalizer UnexpectedToken at Parser.java:58 input='Flat 2B'
2025-10-12T08:23:01.005Z INFO Re-run normalization fixed 320 addresses
2025-10-12T09:30:12.110Z INFO Rolled back library upgrade

title: Catalog performance issue ERR_CAT_9319
description: Catalog search facets slow due to joining across multiple microservices synchronously.
root_cause: Synchronous multi-service calls in facet aggregation causing request tail latency.
resolution_steps: Convert facet aggregation to async fan-out
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-07-04T15:43:34.189Z WARN FacetAggregator p95 latency 1800ms
2025-07-04T15:44:35.004Z INFO Converted to async aggregator
2025-07-04T15:50:01.101Z INFO Cache hit rate improved

title: Orders config issue ERR_ORD_4009
description: Orders service failed to load new payment provider credentials due to mount permission changes.
root_cause: Container filesystem permission changes prevented credentials mount; provider auth failed.
resolution_steps: Fix mount permissions in deployment manifest
Add CI check for mount permissions
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-08-20T02:32:34.189Z ERROR ContainerInit failed to load /secrets/payment-creds permission denied
2025-08-20T02:32:35.003Z WARN ProviderAuth failed status=403
2025-08-20T03:10:12.101Z INFO Permissions corrected and restart succeeded

title: Shipping infra issue ERR_SHI_3806
description: Shipping worker nodes intermittently lose network connectivity to courier API causing failed shipments.
root_cause: Intermittent network partition between shipping cluster and courier gateway due to overloaded edge router.
resolution_steps: Failover to alternate egress via tunnel
Engage infra to fix edge router
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-22T15:42:34.189Z WARN Network egress latency spike node=ship-02 lat=450ms
2025-11-22T15:42:35.003Z ERROR CourierAPI ConnectionRefused
2025-11-22T15:50:12.101Z INFO Failover to tunnel established

title: Inventory bug issue ERR_INV_7655
description: Inventory returned NPE in stock lookup leading to 500s for specific SKUs after metadata migration.
root_cause: Null pointer triggered by missing vendor metadata after schema migration.
resolution_steps: Add null-safety guards in lookup path
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-09-15T05:48:34.189Z ERROR InventoryLookup NullPointerException at InventoryLookup.java:77
2025-09-15T05:48:35.004Z INFO Backfill script started
2025-09-15T06:20:01.110Z INFO Backfill completed

title: Search bug issue ERR_SEA_7293
description: Search service returned 503 during burst traffic; tracing shows thread starvation and blocked IO.
root_cause: Thread starvation from synchronous disk reads in hot path causing service unavailability.
resolution_steps: Add async IO for disk reads
Move to faster storage for hot shards
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-08-06T04:02:34.189Z ERROR SearchWorker ThreadPoolExecutor rejectedExecution at java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor
2025-08-06T04:02:35.003Z WARN DiskIO read latency=120ms for /data/index/seg-12
2025-08-06T04:10:01.101Z INFO Storage tier moved hot shards to SSD

title: Payments infra issue ERR_PAY_4124
description: Payments service hit a certificate expiration causing failed TLS handshakes to external partners for a period.
root_cause: Expired certificate on partner-facing endpoint causing TLS failures.
resolution_steps: Coordinate with partners for trust update
Add cert expiry monitor and alerts
Add automated cert rotation in CI/CD
Update DOC-202 with cert rotation steps
troubleshooting_log_excerpt:
2025-11-15T16:20:34.189Z ERROR TLSHandshake PartnerTLSHandshakeException cert=expired CN=payments.internal
2025-11-15T16:21:05.004Z INFO Deployed new cert
2025-11-15T16:30:01.101Z INFO TLS handshakes restored
